title: crotalaria inflexa
intro: Crotalaria inflexa, also known as the yellow bird flower or yellow calabash, is a plant species in the legume family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria inflexa include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to act as an expectorant to relieve coughs and congestion. The herbal preparations of Crotalaria inflexa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for medicinal purposes.
